(501) JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; REPORTER: ERIC THRONE; CLERK: GARTH SAYERS. PLAINTIFF APPEARED WITH BRENDA CRUZ KEITH, ESQ. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR FOR TRIAL. PROVE-UP WAS PUT ON THE RECORD. PLAINTIFF WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED ON HIS OWN BEHALF. AN EXHIBIT WAS MARKED, MOVED AND ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE. JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 417 GOUGH STREET, #402A. DEFT. SHALL PAY TOTAL BACK RENT AND DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,797.33. COSTS PER COST BILL. LEASE FORFEITED.
